0.text: Newly developed ground-glass opacities with increased density in the bilateral lower lobes of the lungs

1.text: Newly developed ground-glass opacities with increased density in the right middle lobe

2.text: Newly developed ground-glass opacities with increased density in the left lingular segments

3.text: Occasional nodular consolidation in the bilateral lower lobes of the lungs

4.text: Occasional nodular consolidation in the right middle lobe

5.text: Occasional nodular consolidation in the left lingular segments

6.text: Well-defined cavitary nodules measuring 8 mm in the superior segment of the left lower lobe
